title: AI cracks a mystery from 1939 that mathematicians couldn’t solve for decades
summary_full: An artificial intelligence model has aided in identifying a potential solution to an 87-year-old mathematical problem. This development challenges the long-held view of mathematics as a solely human endeavor. Researchers are now exploring AI's potential as a partner in advanced mathematical research. The Jacobian conjecture, proposed in 1939, has resisted decades of human effort. While formal verification is pending, AI's role in creative mathematics is growing.
